chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1567 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.9189/2024. 2. For hearing of CMA No.7212/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 01.09.2025 Mr. Malik Altaf Hussain, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Samiullah Soomro, advocate for the respondent No.3 / Workers Welfare Board Sindh. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- Mr. Samiullah Soomro, advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3, which is taken on record. The instant petition is disposed of on the basis that respondents No.1 to 3 shall implement the Judgments passed by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in the cases of Province of Sindh and others v. Ghulam Fareed and other (2014 SCMR 1189) and Khan Muhammad v. Chief Secretary Balochistan and others (2018 SCMR 1411) with respect to the question of acting / additional charge. Learned counsel for respondent No.3 / Workers Welfare Board Sindh and learned AAG have no objection to such proposition. A copy of this order shall be sent to respondents No.1 to 3 for compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
